creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I'll note that in the years since I've been using
the style of workaround that I indicated in the
beginning of comment 11:

CFLAGS.clang+= -mcpu=cortex-a7
CXXFLAGS.clang+= -mcpu=cortex-a7

CFLAGS.gcc+= -mcpu=cortex-a7
CXXFLAGS.gcc+= -mcpu=cortex-a7

I've not had any problems with such. May be
it could be noted someplace that such is a
way to avoid interfering with default
material in the builds.
